'''鈭歯g-k-t''' ('''ngakata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ectropionize|ectropionize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ectropionize|ectropionize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| ngakata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakatithi|ngakatithi]] || [[word:ngakatiji|ngakatiji]] || [[word:ngakatishi|ngakatishi]] || [[word:ngakati|ngakati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakatuthuth|ngakatuthuth]] || [[word:ngakatujuj|ngakatujuj]] || [[word:ngakatushush|ngakatushush]] || [[word:ngakat|ngakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakatuthu|ngakatuthu]] || [[word:ngakatuju|ngakatuju]] || [[word:ngakatushu|ngakatushu]] || [[word:ngakatu|ngakatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakatufuth|ngakatufuth]] || [[word:ngakatufuj|ngakatufuj]] || [[word:ngakatufush|ngakatufush]] || [[word:ngakatuf|ngakatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakatethe|ngakatethe]] || [[word:ngakateje|ngakateje]] || [[word:ngakateshe|ngakateshe]] || [[word:ngakate|ngakate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakatothoth|ngakatothoth]] || [[word:ngakatojoj|ngakatojoj]] || [[word:ngakatoshosh|ngakatoshosh]] || [[word:ngakat|ngakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakatotho|ngakatotho]] || [[word:ngakatojo|ngakatojo]] || [[word:ngakatosho|ngakatosho]] || [[word:ngakato|ngakato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakatofoth|ngakatofoth]] || [[word:ngakatofoj|ngakatofoj]] || [[word:ngakatofosh|ngakatofosh]] || [[word:ngakatof|ngakatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngakat忙th忙|ngakat忙th忙]] || [[word:ngakat忙j忙|ngakat忙j忙]] || [[word:ngakat忙sh忙|ngakat忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngakat忙|ngakat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngakatathath|ngakatathath]] || [[word:ngakatajaj|ngakatajaj]] || [[word:ngakatashash|ngakatashash]] || [[word:ngakat|ngakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngakatatha|ngakatatha]] || [[word:ngakataja|ngakataja]] || [[word:ngakatasha|ngakatasha]] || [[word:ngakata|ngakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngakatafath|ngakatafath]] || [[word:ngakatafaj|ngakatafaj]] || [[word:ngakatafash|ngakatafash]] || [[word:ngakataf|ngakataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngakatasha|ngakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongakatasha|gongakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingakatasha|gokingakatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngakatn眉sha|ngakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongakatnkn眉sha|gongakatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingakatn眉sha|gokingakatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngakatsh毛sha|ngakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongakatnksh毛sha|gongakatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingakatsh毛sha|gokingakatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakatrosha|ngakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakatnkrosha|gongakatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakatrosha|gokingakatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatmusha|ngakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakatnkmusha|gongakatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakatmusha|gokingakatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngakatsherasha|ngakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongakatnksherasha|gongakatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingakatsherasha|gokingakatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngakatngasha|ngakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongakatnkngasha|gongakatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingakatngasha|gokingakatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngakatyasha|ngakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongakatnkyasha|gongakatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingakatyasha|gokingakatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngakatyamasha|ngakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongakatnkyamasha|gongakatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingakatyamasha|gokingakatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakatn眉sh毛sha|ngakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakatnkn眉sh毛sha|gongakatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakatn眉sh毛sha|gokingakatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakatn眉rosha|ngakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakatnkn眉rosha|gongakatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakatn眉rosha|gokingakatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatn眉musha|ngakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakatnkn眉musha|gongakatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakatn眉musha|gokingakatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakatsh毛n眉sha|ngakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakatnksh毛n眉sha|gongakatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakatsh毛n眉sha|gokingakatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakatsh毛rosha|ngakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakatnksh毛rosha|gongakatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakatsh毛rosha|gokingakatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatsh毛musha|ngakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakatnksh毛musha|gongakatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakatsh毛musha|gokingakatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakatron眉sha|ngakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakatnkron眉sha|gongakatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakatron眉sha|gokingakatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakatrosh毛sha|ngakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakatnkrosh毛sha|gongakatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakatrosh毛sha|gokingakatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngakatromusha|ngakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongakatnkromusha|gongakatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingakatromusha|gokingakatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngakatmun眉sha|ngakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongakatnkmun眉sha|gongakatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingakatmun眉sha|gokingakatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngakatmush毛sha|ngakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongakatnkmush毛sha|gongakatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingakatmush毛sha|gokingakatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngakatmurosha|ngakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongakatnkmurosha|gongakatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingakatmurosha|gokingakatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngakat|ngakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙k忙t|ng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongakat|hongakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙k忙t|hong忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongakat|hohongakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙k忙t|hohong忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngakat|n眉ngakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙k忙t|n眉ng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngakat|n眉n眉ngakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙k忙t|n眉n眉ng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngakat|n茂ngakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙k忙t|n茂ng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngakat|n茂n茂ngakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙k忙t|n茂n茂ng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungakat|lungakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙k忙t|lung忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungakat|lulungakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙k忙t|lulung忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingakat|lingakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙k忙t|ling忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingakat|lilingakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙k忙t|liling忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongakat|kongakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙k忙t|kong忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongakat|kokongakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙k忙t|kokong忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengakat|kengakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙k忙t|keng忙k忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengakat|kekengakat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙k忙t|kekeng忙k忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
